大小单双导师.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239142228_64623616<br>vk.com/topic-239142232_64736674<br>vk.com/topic-239142214_64122661<br>vk.com/topic-239142253_64293731<br>vk.com/topic-239142227_65563702<br>vk.com/topic-239142230_65184315<br>vk.com/topic-239142217_65563701<br>vk.com/topic-239142213_64293735<br>vk.com/topic-239142255_64034963<br>vk.com/topic-239142236_64450693<br>vk.com/topic-239142234_64122668<br>vk.com/topic-239142208_64623624<br>vk.com/topic-239142241_65775384<br>vk.com/topic-239142261_65775389<br>vk.com/topic-239142264_64122684<br>vk.com/topic-239142257_65563718<br>vk.com/topic-239142263_64293751<br>vk.com/topic-239142186_64450713<br>vk.com/topic-239142265_64034987<br>vk.com/topic-239142258_64623642<br>vk.com/topic-239142259_64898946<br>vk.com/topic-239142212_64736709<br>vk.com/topic-239142207_65563724<br>vk.com/topic-239142231_65775411<br>vk.com/topic-239142247_65563730<br>vk.com/topic-239136421_65775415<br>vk.com/topic-239110199_64898924<br>vk.com/topic-239142225_64035030<br>vk.com/topic-239142250_65184390<br>vk.com/topic-239100494_64122720<br>vk.com/topic-239142219_64898994<br>vk.com/topic-239142252_64736752<br>vk.com/topic-239142246_64450764<br>vk.com/topic-239142248_
